title: Tesla reset risk is deepening as Wall Street cuts 2026 delivery expectations again
summary: Reuters reported that Tesla investors and analysts are cutting delivery estimates, with some now expecting a third straight year of annual delivery decline and warning that heavy spending on AI/robotaxi/autonomy projects could revive cash-burn pressure. Full Reuters text was not directly accessible in this run, so the read stays tight, but the source quality is high and the signal is clear: the hoped-for 2026 volume rebound is losing credibility.
